basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Field/Lab Assistant. Candidates with 12th Pass Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through ICAR IARI official website.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 20,000/- per Month (Fixed) & 10% increment each year

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Field/Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: ICAR IARI Field/Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
